title: ostrya carpinifolia var. virginica
intro: Ostrya carpinifolia var. virginica, also known as American hop-hornbeam, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the family Betulaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Ostrya carpinifolia var. virginica include its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and teas, which can be made by steeping the bark or leaves in hot water, and are often used to treat various health conditions.
